title: CCA Extension Nights + Weekends
description: A studio exhibition showcasing work by CCA Extension faculty and students from the Fall 2025 and Winter/Spring 2026 terms.

image.alt: Neon-sign graphic reading "Nights & Weekends" with a glowing crescent moon on the left and a yellow sun on the right, over a deep blue background — the banner for CCA Extension's Nights + Weekends exhibition.
